docs.title: 2026 Remote Work & Hybrid Policy
docs.content:
All employees are eligible for hybrid work after their probation period (3 months). The standard hybrid model requires 3 days in the office (Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday) and allows 2 days remote (Monday and Friday). 

Core working hours are 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM local time. Employees must be available on Slack and Zoom during these hours.

Equipment: The company provides a MacBook Pro, one external monitor, and a one-time home office stipend of $500. Internet costs are not reimbursed unless the role is fully remote.

Fully remote roles require approval from the Department Head and HR Director.

docs.title: Travel & Expense Guidelines
docs.content:
Employees traveling for business are entitled to reimbursement for reasonable expenses. 

- Meals: Daily allowance is $75 per day (receipts required for purchases over $25).
- Flights: Economy class for domestic flights. Premium Economy is allowed for international flights over 8 hours.
- Hotels: Standard room rate up to $250/night in major cities (NY, SF, London) and $180/night elsewhere.
- Rideshare: Uber/Lyft is covered for travel between airport/hotel/office.

Expense claims must be submitted via the finance portal within 30 days of the expense date. Approval is required from your direct manager.

docs.title: Annual Leave & Holidays 2026
docs.content:
Annual Leave:
- Full-time employees receive 20 days of paid annual leave per calendar year.
- Unused leave can roll over (max 5 days) to the first quarter of the next year.
- Leave requests longer than 2 weeks require 1 month's notice.

Sick Leave:
- 10 days of paid sick leave per year. A doctor's note is required for absences of 3 or more consecutive days.

Public Holidays:
We observe all federal holidays. If a holiday falls on a weekend, the following Monday will be observed as a day off.

docs.title: Parental Leave Benefits
docs.content:
Maternity Leave:
Biological mothers are eligible for 16 weeks of fully paid leave. An additional 8 weeks of unpaid leave can be taken.

Paternity/Partner Leave:
Partners are eligible for 6 weeks of fully paid leave to bond with the new child.

Eligibility:
Employees must have been with EDITH for at least 12 months prior to the child's birth or adoption date to qualify for full paid benefits.
